attributes.Sql Query:
SEL BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,BK_PRODUCT_ID 
FROM (SEL BE.ITEM_KEY,BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,SUM (PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT RP ON RP.ITEM_KEY = BE.ITEM_KEY AND RP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'
WHERE BE.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' AND BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'  
AND FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4)  BE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PC 
ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
AND BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')  AND ALLOCATION_PCT=1
WHERE PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1
AND NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_BE_PF_ADJ_PID_MAP A WHERE A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AND A.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD=PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ORDER BY ITEM_KEY DESC)=1

SEL ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,COALESCE ( A.ISO_BE_AMOUNT / NULLIFZERO(ISO_AMOUNT) ,0) AS ISO_BE_ALLOC_PCT
FROM (
SEL DISTINCT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ) AS ISO_BE_AMOUNT ,
SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ) AS ISO_AMOUNT
FROM ( SEL SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) AS TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT  FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BOOKINGS_BY_PID 
WHERE TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT<>0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE')  AND CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'
GROUP BY 1,2,3)
BKGS
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY  SALES_HIER
ON  BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SALES_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH
ON  BKGS.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID=SFH .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
ON BKGS.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY = BE.ITEM_KEY
AND BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT  IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
WHERE BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I' 
AND BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <>'CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES'
) A  WHERE ISO_AMOUNT<>0 AND ISO_BE_ALLOC_PCT<>0

SEL  BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,BK_PRODUCT_ID 
FROM (SEL BE.ITEM_KEY,BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,SUM (PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT RP ON RP.ITEM_KEY = BE.ITEM_KEY AND RP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'
WHERE BE.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' AND BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'  
AND FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4)  BE
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PC 
ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
 AND  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN') 
WHERE PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1  AND BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE '%_ADJ_%' 
AND NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_BE_PF_ADJ_PID_MAP A WHERE A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AND A.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD=PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ORDER BY ITEM_KEY DESC)=1

SEL * FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,PID_BIE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,NULL AS PRODUCT_ID,
CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT * ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT) 
OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ) AS DECIMAL(30,16))AS TOTAL_BE,
CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT * ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT) 
OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,PID_BIE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ) AS DECIMAL(30,16))AS TOTAL_BE_PF,
CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT * ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT)
OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,PID_BIE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD )AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BOOKINGS_BY_PID  PID1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY  SALES_HIER
ON  PID1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SALES_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH
ON  PID1.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID=SFH .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC PID_BIE
ON PID_BIE.ITEM_KEY=PID1.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY AND PID_BIE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)) AND PID_BIE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PC 
ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=PID1.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)) AND BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN') 

WHERE TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT<>0  AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE')  AND CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'
AND  BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID ='CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES'
) A
WHERE TOTAL_BE <>0

SEL ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,COALESCE ( A.ISO_BE_AMOUNT / NULLIFZERO(ISO_AMOUNT) ,0) AS ISO_BE_ALLOC_PCT
FROM (
SEL DISTINCT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ) AS ISO_BE_AMOUNT ,
SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ) AS ISO_AMOUNT
FROM ( SEL SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) AS TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT  FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BOOKINGS_BY_PID 
WHERE TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT<>0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE')  AND CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'
GROUP BY 1,2,3)
BKGS
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALES_HIER
ON  BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SALES_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH
ON  BKGS.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID=SFH .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
ON BKGS.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY = BE.ITEM_KEY
AND BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT  IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
WHERE BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
AND BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID ='CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES'
) A  WHERE ISO_AMOUNT<>0 AND ISO_BE_ALLOC_PCT<>0

SEL * FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,PID_BIE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,NULL AS PRODUCT_ID,
CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT * ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT) 
OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ) AS DECIMAL(30,16))AS TOTAL_BE,
CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT * ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT) 
OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,PID_BIE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ) AS DECIMAL(30,16))AS TOTAL_BE_PF,
CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT * ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT)
OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,PID_BIE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD )AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
FROM 
(
SEL SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,SUM (TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) AS TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BOOKINGS_BY_PID 
WHERE TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT<>0  AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  IN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE')  AND CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
)PID1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY  SALES_HIER
ON  PID1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SALES_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH
ON  PID1.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID=SFH .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC PID_BIE
ON PID_BIE.ITEM_KEY=PID1.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY AND PID_BIE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)) AND PID_BIE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PC 
ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=PID1.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)) AND BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN') 
WHERE  BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <>'CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES'
) A
WHERE TOTAL_BE <>0

SEL DISTINCT A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR, PID_MAP.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,
CAST(SUM(A.TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,A.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) /
CAST(SUM(A.TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS PID_ALLOC_PCT
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_NON_CMS_BE_PID_MAP A
INNER JOIN
(
SEL A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR, A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_NON_CMS_BE_PF_MAP A,
(SEL * FROM $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_NON_CMS_BE_PF_MAP WHERE  CUM_PCT>79.999999
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR  ORDER BY  CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT DESC) = 1)B
WHERE A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=B.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AND  A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID=B.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID AND A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=B.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND A.CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT >=B.CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT
)PF
ON   A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=PF.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AND  A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID=PF.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID
AND A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=PF.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR AND A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=PF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BE_PF_ADJ_PID_MAP PID_MAP
ON PID_MAP.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND PID_MAP.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
AND PID_MAP.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD=A.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD

SEL  BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,BK_PRODUCT_ID 
FROM (SEL BE.ITEM_KEY,BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,SUM (PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT RP ON RP.ITEM_KEY = BE.ITEM_KEY AND RP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'
WHERE BE.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' AND BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'  
AND FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4)  BE
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PC 
ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
 AND  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN') 
WHERE PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1 
AND NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_BE_PF_ADJ_PID_MAP A WHERE A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AND A.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD=PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ORDER BY ITEM_KEY DESC)=1

SEL  BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,BK_PRODUCT_ID 
FROM (SEL BE.ITEM_KEY,BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,SUM (PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT RP ON RP.ITEM_KEY = BE.ITEM_KEY AND RP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'
WHERE BE.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' AND BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'  
AND FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4)  BE
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PC 
ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
AND  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN') 
WHERE NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_BE_PF_ADJ_PID_MAP A WHERE A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AND A.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD=PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ORDER BY ITEM_KEY DESC)=1

SEL DISTINCT A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR, PID_MAP.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,
CAST(SUM(A.TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,A.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) /
CAST(SUM(A.TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS PID_ALLOC_PCT
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_CMS_BE_PID_MAP A
INNER JOIN
(
SEL A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR, A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_CMS_BE_PF_MAP A,
(SEL * FROM $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_CMS_BE_PF_MAP WHERE  CUM_PCT>79.999999
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR  ORDER BY  CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT DESC) = 1)B
WHERE A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=B.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AND  A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID=B.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID AND A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=B.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND A.CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT >=B.CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT
)PF
ON   A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=PF.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AND  A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID=PF.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID
AND A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=PF.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR AND A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=PF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BE_PF_ADJ_PID_MAP PID_MAP
ON PID_MAP.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND PID_MAP.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
AND PID_MAP.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD=A.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD

SEL ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
(TOTAL_BE_PF/TOTAL_BE)* 100 AS CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT,CSUM (CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT,CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT DESC) AS CUM_PCT
FROM 
(SEL DISTINCT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,TOTAL_BE,TOTAL_BE_PF FROM $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_CMS_BE_PID_MAP )A
GROUP BY 1,2,3

SEL ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
(TOTAL_BE_PF/TOTAL_BE)* 100 AS CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT,CSUM (CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT,CTRY_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT DESC) AS CUM_PCT
FROM 
(SEL DISTINCT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,TOTAL_BE,TOTAL_BE_PF FROM $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_NON_CMS_BE_PID_MAP )A
GROUP BY 1,2,3

SEL  BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,BK_PRODUCT_ID 
FROM (SEL BE.ITEM_KEY,BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,SUM (PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT RP ON RP.ITEM_KEY = BE.ITEM_KEY AND RP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'
WHERE BE.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' AND BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'  
AND FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4)  BE
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PC 
ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
 AND  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN') 
WHERE BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE '%_ADJ_%' 
AND NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_BE_PF_ADJ_PID_MAP A WHERE A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=BE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=BE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AND A.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD=PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ORDER BY ITEM_KEY DESC)=1

SEL  BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,BK_PRODUCT_ID 
FROM (SEL BE.ITEM_KEY,BE.BK_PRODUCT_ID,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,SUM (PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT RP ON RP.ITEM_KEY = BE.ITEM_KEY AND RP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN'
WHERE BE.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' AND BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'  
AND FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4)  BE
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PC 
ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY 
AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT
IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
AND  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN')   AND ALLOCATION_PCT=1
WHERE PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT=1  AND BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE '%_ADJ_%' 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ORDER BY ITEM_KEY DESC)=1

SEL L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID, BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR, COALESCE ( A.L1_BE_AMOUNT / NULLIFZERO(L1_AMOUNT) ,0) AS L1_BE_ALLOC_PCT
FROM (
SEL DISTINCT L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,
SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BYL1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ) AS L1_BE_AMOUNT ,
SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BYL1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ) AS L1_AMOUNT
FROM (SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) AS TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BOOKINGS_BY_PID 
WHERE TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT<>0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE')AND CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y' 
AND RECORD_TYPEIN('DS_SQ_PSG','DS_SQ_NPSG','DS_PSG','DS_NPSG','MS','MS_BP','PRIOR PERIOD', 'DS_SO_PSG','DS_SO_NPSG','PB_ATTRB')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5) BKGS
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHYSALES_HIER
ON BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SALES_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY

/*INNER JOIN (SELECT 
LINE_LINK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BSVC.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,LINE_LINK.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID AS PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
LINE_LINK.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,BSVC.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SO_LINE_LINK LINE_LINK 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC BSVC
ON LINE_LINK.APPROVED_DEAL_ID=BSVC.APPROVED_DEAL_ID
AND LINE_LINK.CS_DEAL_PRDT_SUB_GROUP_ID=BSVC.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
WHERE DV_ATTRIBUTION_CDIN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE') AND BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <>'CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES'
AND BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID IN (SELECT BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_L1_NON_CMS_BE_MAP GROUP BY 1)
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5) SFH 
ONSFH.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID = BKGS.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
AND SFH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND SFH.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD */

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC SFH
ON SFH.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID = BKGS.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
AND SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <>'CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES'

INNER JOIN (SELECT ITEM_KEY,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT = (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)) 
AND BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I' GROUP BY 1,2,3) BE
ON BKGS.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY = BE.ITEM_KEY 
) AWHERE L1_AMOUNT<>0 AND L1_BE_ALLOC_PCT<>0
attributes.Pre SQL:
DEL FROM $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_L1_NON_CMS_BE_MAP ALL;

INSERT INTO $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_L1_NON_CMS_BE_MAP
SELECT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR FROM (
SELECT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID, COALESCE ( A.ISO_L1_AMOUNT / NULLIFZERO(ISO_AMOUNT) ,0) AS ISO_L1_ALLOC_PCT
FROM (
SEL DISTINCT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID, L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BYISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR ) AS ISO_L1_AMOUNT ,
SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BYISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ) AS ISO_AMOUNT
FROM ( SEL SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) AS TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BOOKINGS_BY_PID 
WHERE TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT<>0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CDIN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE')AND CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y' 
AND RECORD_TYPEIN('DS_SQ_PSG','DS_SQ_NPSG','DS_PSG','DS_NPSG','MS','MS_BP','PRIOR PERIOD', 'DS_SO_PSG','DS_SO_NPSG','PB_ATTRB')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5) BKGS
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHYSALES_HIER
ON BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SALES_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND ISO_COUNTRY_CODE in (SELECT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE FROM $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_SC_NON_CMS_BE_MAP WHERE(ISO_BE_ALLOC_PCT>1 OR ISO_BE_ALLOC_PCT<-1) GROUP BY 1)

/*INNER JOIN (SELECT 
LINE_LINK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BSVC.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,BSVC.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID ,LINE_LINK.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID AS PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
LINE_LINK.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,BSVC.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SO_LINE_LINK LINE_LINK 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC BSVC
ON LINE_LINK.APPROVED_DEAL_ID=BSVC.APPROVED_DEAL_ID
AND LINE_LINK.CS_DEAL_PRDT_SUB_GROUP_ID=BSVC.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
WHERE DV_ATTRIBUTION_CDIN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE') AND BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <>'CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES'
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6) SFH 
ONSFH.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID = BKGS.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
AND SFH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND SFH.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD */

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC SFH
ON SFH.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID = BKGS.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID 
AND SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <>'CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES'

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE
ON BKGS.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY = BE.ITEM_KEY
AND BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 
 IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEARWHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH))
WHERE BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
) AWHERE ISO_AMOUNT<>0 AND ISO_L1_ALLOC_PCT<>0
 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_SC_NON_CMS_BE_MAP WHERE(ISO_BE_ALLOC_PCT>1 OR ISO_BE_ALLOC_PCT<-1) GROUP BY 1,2
) B WHERE B.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE =A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AND B.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID=A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID)
) L1 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ORDER BYISO_L1_ALLOC_PCT DESC) = 1;

COLLECT STATS ON $$STGDB.WI_CTRY_L1_NON_CMS_BE_MAP;

DELFROM $$STGDB.WI_L1_SC_NON_CMS_BE_MAP ALL;

attributes.Sql Query:
SEL DISTINCT A.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR ,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR, PID_MAP.BK_PRODUCT_ID ,
CAST(SUM(A.TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,A.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) /
CAST(SUM(A.TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS PID_ALLOC_PCT
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_L1_NON_CMS_BE_PID_MAP A
INNER JOIN
(
SEL A.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR ,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR, A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_L1_NON_CMS_BE_PF_MAP A,
(SEL * FROM $$STGDB.WI_L1_NON_CMS_BE_PF_MAP WHERE CUM_PCT>79.999999
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR  ORDER BY  L1_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT DESC) = 1)B
WHERE A.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR=B.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AND  A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID=B.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID AND A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=B.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND A.L1_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT >=B.L1_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT
)PF
ON A.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR=PF.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AND A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID=PF.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID
AND A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=PF.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR AND A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=PF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BE_PF_ADJ_PID_MAP PID_MAP
ON PID_MAP.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR=A.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR
AND PID_MAP.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=A.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
AND PID_MAP.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD=A.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD
attributes.Pre SQL:
DEL FROM $$STGDB.WI_L1_NON_CMS_BE_PID_MAP ALL; 

INSERT INTO $$STGDB.WI_L1_NON_CMS_BE_PID_MAP
SEL * FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,PID_BIE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,NULL AS PRODUCT_ID,
CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT * ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT) 
OVER (PARTITION BY  L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS TOTAL_BE,
CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT * ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT) 
OVER (PARTITION BY  L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,PID_BIE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS TOTAL_BE_PF,
CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT * ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE*PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*ALLOCATION_PCT)
OVER (PARTITION BY  L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,PID_BIE.BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR,PID_BIE.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,PC.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
FROM (SEL SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,SUM (TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) AS TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BOOKINGS_BY_PID 
WHERE TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT<>0  AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE') AND CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG='Y'
AND RECORD_TYPE IN ('DS_SQ_PSG','DS_SQ_NPSG','DS_PSG','DS_NPSG','MS','MS_BP','PRIOR PERIOD', 'DS_SO_PSG','DS_SO_NPSG','PB_ATTRB')
GROUP BY 1,2,3 )PID1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SALES_HIER
ON PID1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SALES_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH
ON PID1.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID=SFH.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC PID_BIE
ON PID_BIE.ITEM_KEY=PID1.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY AND PID_BIE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT IN 
(SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)) AND PID_BIE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN PC 
ON PC.PRODUCT_KEY=PID1.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY AND PC.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT IN 
(SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)) AND BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS' ,'UNKNOWN') 
WHERE BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <>'CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES'
) A
WHERE TOTAL_BE <>0; 
 
COLLECT STATS ON $$STGDB.WI_L1_NON_CMS_BE_PID_MAP;

DEL FROM $$STGDB.WI_L1_NON_CMS_BE_PF_MAP ALL; 

INSERT INTO $$STGDB.WI_L1_NON_CMS_BE_PF_MAP
SEL L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR ,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
(TOTAL_BE_PF/TOTAL_BE)* 100 AS L1_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT,CSUM (L1_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT,L1_BE_PF_ALLOC_PCT DESC) AS CUM_PCT
FROM 
(SEL DISTINCT L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR ,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID ,BUSINESS_ENTITY_DESCR ,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,TOTAL_BE,TOTAL_BE_PF FROM $$STGDB.WI_L1_NON_CMS_BE_PID_MAP )A
GROUP BY 1,2,3; 

COLLECT STATS ON $$STGDB.WI_L1_NON_CMS_BE_PF_MAP;

DEL FROM $$STGDB.WI_L1_SC_NON_CMS_BE_PID_MAP ALL;
